definition:
1. a turning back , (Xenophon Historicus); ἀποστροφὴν λαμβάνειν to have one's course turned, (Plutarch) 
2. a turning away from, an escape from  a thing, with genitive, (Aeschulus Tragicus) 
3. a resort, resource , (Herdotus Historicus):—;with genitive objecti, ὕδατος ἀπ. a resource  or means for getting  water, (Euripides); σωτηρίας ἀπ. (Thucydides) (ML)
